audit_items.proof_trace: The if/else at L350 (`if (asset == s_assetOut)`) is mutually exclusive: the assetOut branch executes `safeTransfer` to `s_assetOutReceiver` (L351) and the `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` write (L353) is confined entirely to the `else` branch. Grep confirms L353 is the only write to `s_auctionStarts` in this function, and it is structurally unreachable when `asset == s_assetOut`. The property holds unconditionally.
